full_text:
Zhang Qiu 張球
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Qiu (張球). Served Cao Rui, sent to set a fire trap against Wu, burning many ships. Zhang Qiu may not have existed in history. Zhang Qiu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
